ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "ss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "pe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who made the sale */,
  "s_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale was made */,
  "ss_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "ssb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the sales transaction */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "ssb_unitary_price_euro" REAL /* Unit price of the product in euros */,
  "ssb_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "ssb_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the sale */,
  "ssb_item_price" REAL /* Total price of the item sold (unitary price * quantity) */,
  "ssb_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sales transaction */,
  "ssb_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the sales transaction */,
  "ssb_payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "ssb_order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ss_id", "ssb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_s_id FOREIGN KEY ("s_id") REFERENCES stores ("s_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_pe_id FOREIGN KEY ("pe_id") REFERENCES employees ("pe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES products ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "pe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "pe_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "s_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the employee works */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee (e.g., manager, sales associate) */,
  "pe_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "pe_performance_rating" REAL /* Employee's performance rating */,
  "pe_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_s_id FOREIGN KEY ("s_id") REFERENCES stores ("s_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "s_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "s_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "s_region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "s_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "s_opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("s_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "pr_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "pr_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product (e.g., kg, liter) */,
  "pr_size" REAL /* Size of the product (e.g., 0.3 kg, 0.5 liter) */,
  "pr_package_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging (e.g., box, can) */,
  "pr_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "pr_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "pr_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "pr_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "pr_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "sup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "sup_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "sup_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "sup_rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "supply_date" TEXT /* Date the product was supplied */,
  "supply_price_euro" REAL /* Supply price of the product in euros */,
  "ps_lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  "ps_supplier_status" TEXT /* Status of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_sup_id FOREIGN KEY ("sup_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("sup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES products ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
